overview: Grade jobs A-F based on fit with skills, experience, and preferences. Higher grades indicate better fit and higher likelihood of success.

criteria: Job requirements match 80%+ of core skills
Budget/rate is at or above preferred rate ($60+/hr or equivalent)
Project scope is clear and well-defined
Duration aligns with availability
Client has good history (payment verified, positive reviews)
Technology stack is familiar and enjoyable to work with
Project type matches past successful projects

B.description: Good fit - Worth applying with some considerations
criteria: Job requirements match 60-80% of core skills
Budget is reasonable ($45-60/hr range or equivalent)
Minor skill gaps that can be quickly learned
Project scope is mostly clear with some ambiguity
Client history is decent or new client with good communication
Interesting project that could expand skills

C.description: Moderate fit - Consider if slow period or interesting project
criteria: Job requirements match 40-60% of core skills
Budget is below preferred but acceptable ($35-45/hr)
Some skill gaps that require learning
Project scope has some red flags or vagueness
Client has limited or mixed history
Project type is outside comfort zone but doable

D.description: Poor fit - Only apply if desperate or strategically valuable
criteria: Job requirements match less than 40% of core skills
Budget is significantly below market rate
Major skill gaps requiring substantial learning
Project scope is unclear or unrealistic
Client has red flags (new with unrealistic expectations, poor reviews)
High risk of scope creep or difficult client relationship

F.description: Not a fit - Do not apply
criteria: Job requirements don't match skills at all
Budget is unacceptably low
Project is outside expertise with no interest in learning
Clear red flags (asking for free work, unrealistic timeline)
Client has poor payment history or negative reviews
Project involves technologies or domains to avoid

positive_signals: Mentions code reviews or quality standards
red_flags: Asking for free samples or unpaid tests
Multiple failed hires on this job
Scope creep indicators ("and other tasks as needed")
avoid_project_types: Simple data entry or admin tasks

rate_preferences.notes: Will consider lower rates for interesting projects, long-term relationships, or portfolio-building opportunities
